name: MAYS J W INC
summary: J.W. Mays, Inc. is a New York-based commercial real estate company founded in 1924 and incorporated in 1927. Operating from its executive offices at Nine Bond Street, Brooklyn, New York, the company manages a number of commercial real estate properties. It employs 28 full-time workers, approximately 21% of whom are covered by a union contract expiring November 30, 2025.
